title: bromus squarrosus var. scoparius
intro: Bromus squarrosus var. scoparius, also known as Brome grass or Brome, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Brome grass include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Brome grass can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine, particularly in European and Asian cultures.
